summary: Full frontend testing of the new PlansRegistryPage at /plans. All 50 test assertions passed across 4 test batches. Page structure, filter tabs, status/attention pills, progress bars, current-pass cells, row data-testids, title brightness, footer, navigation, and all existing route regressions verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Empty state is not reachable via the current MOCK_PLANS data — all 6 filter tabs have at least 1 matching plan. The EmptyState component exists and its code logic is correct (triggers when filteredPlans.length === 0), but it cannot be exercised from the UI without injecting custom plans prop or modifying mock data. Not a bug — just a note that the empty state cannot be end-to-end tested without prop injection.
seed_data_creation: None — all data is MOCK_PLANS constant in PlansRegistryPage.js

context_for_next_testing_agent: PlansRegistryPage at /plans is fully tested and working. All data is MOCKED via MOCK_PLANS constant (8 plans). All filter tabs have 1+ items so empty state is not reachable from UI. RelayShell now has nav-plans-btn alongside nav-runs-btn on all stage pages (/intake, /, /execute, /audit). RunsRegistryPage also has nav-plans-btn. All navigation tested and working. Previous tests: iteration_6 covered RunsRegistryPage, iteration_5 covered IntakePage.
